LEGAL BOUNDARY · DATA-ZERO POSTURE · PUBLIC-SAFE BY DEFAULT
GoalOS AGIJobManagerLegal Boundary
HomePrivacyTermsRegulatoryAGIALPHA BoundaryResponsibilityAssuranceInstitution
Data-zero privacy

We do not want
your personal data.

Do not submit personal data. Do not submit personal, confidential, regulated, customer, health, financial, biometric, child, employment, government-ID, private-key, wallet-seed, privileged, or proprietary data. The site does not need it.

Intentionally absent

No collection stack.

No accounts. No forms. No analytics. No cookies. No advertising pixels. No fingerprinting. No customer database. No mailing list. No support chat. No server-side app controlled by this repository.

Browser local

The chamber runs locally.

The read-only chamber creates unsigned JSON in your browser. If you download or copy it, you control it. The project does not receive it.

Expert Console

Your wallet is your responsibility.

The Expert Console uses your wallet only after explicit action. Wallet, RPC, gas, approval, transaction, and blockchain data are handled by your chosen providers and public networks.

GitHub Pages

Hosting is third-party.

GitHub hosts the static site and may process technical access data under GitHub's own policies. If you do not accept that, do not access the site.

Rights requests

Usually, there is no project-held user record.

Because this project intentionally does not collect user data, there is generally no account, profile, or user-data record to access, correct, export, or delete. Data you publish to GitHub, a wallet, an RPC provider, IPFS, Ethereum Mainnet, Etherscan, X, or another third-party system is handled by that third party or by you.

Browser-local demos

Typed demo text is not submitted.

The Start, Demo Lab, Mission Studio, and Proof Cards pages run in the current browser session only. They do not submit input, create accounts, set cookies, use analytics, connect wallets, or store text in browser storage. Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, wallet, seed phrase, private-key, or customer data.
